claim: For self-dual C length 24 dimension 12, dim C_S = |S|-12 + dim C_{S^c}.
proof: dim pi_S(C)=12-dim C_{S^c}; annihilator of pi_S(C) is C_S; hence dim C_S=|S|-dim pi_S(C).

claim: The full support-rank spectrum for all k is determined by the exact spectrum for k<=12.
For k>12 every support has baseline shortened rank at least k-12.
proof: dim C_S = k-12 + dim C_{S^c} >= k-12.

claim: The image dimension of the projected sign law on S is k-dim C_S = 12-dim C_{S^c}.
The projection law on S is uniform over 2^(k-dim C_S) atoms.
proof: Pushforward of uniform distribution on finite vector space through linear map.
